document_metadata._usage: Automated file — add entries within your sections, newest on top. Rollover auto-archives sessions/key_learnings (+ observations.json) to @memory; todos[] are OPERATIONAL and NEVER rolled — prune done ones by hand at /prep. Limits live in @memory's memory.config.json.

guidelines.purpose: Capture collaboration patterns and experiential insights over time
guidelines.chronological_order: Newest entries at TOP, oldest at BOTTOM - NEVER reorder

observations.note: Branch initialized. Ready to begin capturing collaboration patterns.
